extortion.description: CannonDesign is a global architecture, engineering and consulting practice that provides services for a range of project types, including hospitals and medical centers, corporate headquarters and commercial office buildings, higher education and PK-12 education facilities, hotels and hospitality, mixed-use, sports facilities, and science and research buildings. In 2017 and 2019, Fast Company named CannonDesign one of the 10 most innovative architecture firms in the world.
